riders/king-of-classics.label: King of the classics
riders/king-of-classics.notes: Career points in one-day races; grows
riders/king-of-classics.description: Who is the best classics rider of alltime? Eddy Merckx has accumulated 22746 points over his career in one day races, Francesco Moser has 20119 points and Marianne Vos has 20028 points.

riders/youngest-riders.label: Youngest riders
riders/youngest-riders.description: The youngest riders with a UCI contract in 2026 are Haruta Nakamura (17y + 342d), Ignas Kertenis (18y + 2d) and Oscar Amey (18y + 4d).

rows.name: SULLIVAN Thomas
rows.team: Meridian Racing p/b de la Uz

riders/most-badges.label: Most badges
riders/most-badges.description: Tadej Pogačar has accumulated the most badges in cycling.

riders/badges.label: Badges list
riders/badges.description: List of obtainable badges on ProCyclingStats. The highest values badges are Grand Tour Trilogy, Grand Tour Victory and World Champion.

rows.name: Grand Tour Trilogy
rows.description: Winning all three Grand Tours.

rows.name: Grand Tour Victory
rows.description: Winning one of the three grand tours.

rows.name: World Champion
rows.description: Winning a World Championship, road or time trial.

rows.name: Grand Tour Stage Trilogy
rows.description: Winning a stage in all grand tours.

rows.name: Grand Tour Leader Trilogy
rows.description: Has been the leader in all grand tours.

rows.name: King Of Spring
rows.description: Winner of the King of Spring ranking in a season.

rows.name: 100 Career Wins
rows.description: Winning 100 professional races in a career.

rows.name: Allrounder Winner
rows.description: Winning a GC, classic, time trial, climber stage and a bunchsprint.

rows.name: Favorite500 Winner
rows.description: Voted most favorite rider by visitors of PCS in the end of year Favorite500 ranking.

rows.name: 10 Year Performance
rows.description: Having a top-100 ranking in the PCS ranking in 10 or more seasons.

rows.name: Attacker
rows.description: Reaching 5000 career attack kilometers.

rows.name: Single Season Grand Tours Finisher
rows.description: Riders that finished all three grand tours in one season.

rows.name: Rupicapra
rows.description: Competed 10 iconic climbs in France, Spain and Italy.

rows.name: Flanders-Roubaix Combo
rows.description: Winning Tour of Flanders and Paris-Roubaix in the same season.

rows.name: Sprinter
rows.description: Earned when beating 3 riders from the top-10 of the PCS sprinters ranking in a bunch sprint.

rows.name: Championship Trifecta
rows.description: Winning a national, continental and world championship title, TT or RR.

rows.name: Stage Race 50 Finishing Streak
rows.description: Streak of 50 stage races finishing without a DNF.

rows.name: Chrono
rows.description: Earned when beating 3 riders from the top-10 of the PCS time trial ranking in a time trial.

rows.name: Team Debut Winner
rows.description: Winning the first UCI stage or race (excluding NCs) as a team debutant.

rows.name: 1250 Racedays
rows.description: Reaching 1250 UCI racedays in career.

rows.name: Top-10 Monuments
rows.description: Finishing top-10 in each of the 5 monuments.

rows.name: Hattrick
rows.description: Winning 3 stages in a row within the same stage race.

rows.name: Olympic Champion
rows.description: Gold medal at the Olympics

rows.name: Allrounder
rows.description: Finishing top-3 in a GC, time trial, sprint, climber stage and a classic.

rows.name: Victory King
rows.description: Winning the most races in a season.

rows.name: 50 Career Wins
rows.description: Winning 50 professional races in a career.

rows.name: Team Loyalty
rows.description: A rider earns the Team Loyalty badge when being on a team 10 consecutive years.

rows.name: Team SuperLoyalty
rows.description: 15 consecutive years with one team.

rows.name: PCS Ranking Leader
rows.description: Leading the PCS Ranking for at least one week.

rows.name: Grand Tour Podium
rows.description: Finishing on the podium of one of the three grand tours.

rows.name: Olympic Medal
rows.description: Top-3 at the Olympics

rows.name: World Championships Medallist
rows.description: Winning a medal at the World Championships Elite (RR or TT).

rows.name: Favorite500 Ranking
rows.description: Rider has reached a ranking within the Favorite500.

rows.name: Finishing Monuments
rows.description: Riders that have finished all 5 monument classics.

rows.name: Fox
rows.description: Winning a race while positions 2,3 and 4 are from another but equal team.

rows.name: Fast Race Winner
rows.description: Winning a race or stage (non TT) with average speed over 50 km/hour.

rows.name: Six Continents Competitor
rows.description: Competing in a UCI race on six continents.

rows.name: 10 World Championships Starts
rows.description: Starting at least 10 times at the world championships.

rows.name: 10x10 Streak
rows.description: Finishing top-10 on 10 results in a row.

rows.name: Homeground Stagerace Winner
rows.description: Winning a professional stage race in rider home country.

rows.name: Season Best For Nation
rows.description: Highest ranked rider for their country on the PCS season ranking.

rows.name: Family Follow-up
rows.description: Winning the same race as a family member did before.

rows.name: Olympic Diploma
rows.description: Top-8 at the Olympics.

rows.name: National Champion
rows.description: Winning a National Championship title (RR or TT).

rows.name: Major Tours Finisher
rows.description: Riders that finished all 7 Major Tours in their career.

rows.name: Veteran Winner
rows.description: Winning at age 35 or older.

rows.name: Winning All Leader Jerseys
rows.description: Winning GC, Points, KOM and Youth classification in a career.

rows.name: Global Racer
rows.description: Started in races in 30 or more countries.

rows.name: Most Popular Rider of the Day
rows.description: Having the most profile views on procyclingstats.com on one 1 day.

rows.name: U22 Grand Tour Finisher
rows.description: Riders of age 21 or younger that finished a grand tour.

rows.name: Solo Winner
rows.description: Winning after a solo of at least 10 kilometer.

rows.name: 1000 Racedays
rows.description: Reaching 1000 UCI racedays in career.

rows.name: Stage Race 25 Finishing Streak
rows.description: Streak of 25 stage races finishing without a DNF.

rows.name: Grand Tour Finish Trilogy
rows.description: Riders that finished all three grand tours in their career.

rows.name: Edelweiss
rows.description: Winning in the Alps above 1500 meter.

rows.name: Birthday Winner
rows.description: Winning a professional race on your birthday

rows.name: Youngest Top-100 Rider
rows.description: Being the youngest rider in the top-100 of the PCS ranking.

rows.name: Super Domestique
rows.description: Finishing 100 times as 2nd from the team.

rows.name: Grand Tour Leader
rows.description: Leader in one of the grand tours.

rows.name: Season Debut Winner
rows.description: Winning on the first UCI raceday of the season.

rows.name: World Championships Competitor
rows.description: Starting in the World Championships for Elite riders (RR or TT).

rows.name: Finishing Streak
rows.description: 150 racedays without a DNF.

rows.name: Starting Monuments
rows.description: Starting in all 5 monuments.

rows.name: Youngest Race Winner
rows.description: The youngest rider to win a race once there are at least 10 editions done (excluding NCs).

rows.name: All level winner
rows.description: Winner of a race at .2, .1, .PRO and WT level

rows.name: Grand Tour Red Lantern
rows.description: Finishing last in a grand tour.

rows.name: Warm Weather Winner
rows.description: Winning a professional race with average temperature above 35 degrees.

rows.name: Grand Tour Finisher
rows.description: Finishing a grand tour.

rows.name: BIB King
rows.description: Starting with 100 different BIBs in UCI road races.

rows.name: Grand Tour Starter
rows.description: Starting in a grand tour.

rows.name: Monument Finisher
rows.description: Finishing a monument classic.

rows.name: Cold Weather Winner
rows.description: Winning a race with average temperature under 5 degrees.

rows.name: Monument Starter
rows.description: Starting in a monument classic.

riders/points-per-raceday.label: Points per race day
riders/points-per-raceday.description: The most effective rider measured in points per raceday in 2026 was Tadej Pogačar with 1823 points in 15 racedays. Second was Mathieu van der Poel with 58.2 points per raceday and third Paul Seixas with a ratio of 55.

riders/wins-wt-level.label: Wins on WT level
riders/wins-wt-level.description: List of riders with the most victories in the UCI WorldTour in 2026

riders/wins-world-champions.label: Wins by world champions
riders/wins-world-champions.description: How many victories had each world champion? had 17 wins when he was the world champion

riders/penalty-points.label: UCI Penalty Points ranking
riders/penalty-points.description: Tomas Contte has accumulated 100 penalty points in 2026.

riders/penalty-points-teams.label: Penalty points by team
riders/penalty-points-teams.description: In 2025 it was Lidl - Trek with 200 penalty points who had the most points subtracted, before Team Visma | Lease a Bike (185) and Red Bull - BORA - hansgrohe (150).

riders/wt-classics-ranking.label: WT one-day races ranking
riders/wt-classics-ranking.description: Tadej Pogačar has scored 1250 points in one day races in the WorldTour like Tour of Flanders, Paris-Roubaix and Classica San Sebastian.

riders/solo-victories.label: Solo victories
riders/solo-victories.description: Tadej Pogačar has done a solo of 79.2 kilometre in Strade Bianche, which was the longest solo in 2026 in the WorldTour.

riders/gt-gc-riders.description: Will Jonas Vingegaard, Tadej Pogačar, João Almeida compete in the Tour de France, Giro d

riders/top100-season-start.label: Season start for top-100
riders/top100-season-start.notes: Current season; updates early in year
riders/top100-season-start.description: For so far known, Tadej Pogačar will start his season in Strade Bianche. Jonas Vingegaard is scheduled for Paris-Nice and Isaac del Toro is on the startlist of UAE Tour. This table lists the starting race of the top-100 best riders for the 2026 season.

riders/most-allround.label: Most allround riders
riders/most-allround.description: Looking at the 5 specialties of climbing, sprinting, classics, time trial and classification, Wout van Aert ranks the highest of the active riders before Mathieu van der Poel and Michael Matthews.

riders/single-specialty.label: Single specialty riders
riders/single-specialty.description: Mark Cavendish has scored the most points in the sprint, far more than any other cycling specialty. Philippe Gilbert has scored most points in classics, where Tony Martin has the most points in time trials.

riders/alltime-tt-ranking.label: All time TT ranking
riders/alltime-tt-ranking.description: has 63 victories in time trials and a grand total of 1150 points. Runner-up is with 1017 points in time trials and has 957 points obtained in his career.

grandtours/most-starts.label: Grand tour most starts
grandtours/most-starts.description: The rider with the most starts in grand tours is TOSATTO Matteo with 34 starts. He started 12 times in the Tour de France, 13 times in the Giro d

grandtours/most-wins.label: Grand tour most wins
grandtours/most-wins.description: Who has the most grand tour wins? Eddy Merckx has won 11 grand tours, before Bernard Hinault (10) and Alberto Contador (9).

grandtours/all-3-gts.label: Stage winners in all 3 GTs
grandtours/all-3-gts.description: There are 116 riders that have won at least one stage in the grand tours Tour de France, Giro d

grandtours/most-stage-wins.label: Grand tour most stage wins
grandtours/most-stage-wins.description: With a total of 64 stage wins, Eddy Merckx has won the most stages in the grand tours. He won 24 stage in the Giro d

grandtours/stage-wins-teams.label: Grand tour stage wins by teams
grandtours/stage-wins-teams.description: Soudal Quick-Step has won 102 stages in the last 10 season in the grand tours. Second is UAE Team Emirates - XRG with 80 wins, before Team Visma | Lease a Bike with 72 victories.

monuments/most-wins.label: Monument most wins
monuments/most-wins.description: There are 114 riders that have won more than one monumental classic. Eddy Merckx has won the most monuments, 19 in total. With 223 victories, Belgium has the most victories by nation.

monuments/youngest-winners.label: Monument youngest winners
monuments/youngest-winners.description: The youngest winner of a monument classic is Victor Fastre in Liège - Bastogne - Liège 1909. Second youngest is Georges Ronsse with his win in Liège - Bastogne - Liège in 1925.

monuments/oldest-winners.label: Monument oldest winners
monuments/oldest-winners.description: The oldest winner of a monument classic is Gilbert Duclos-Lassalle in Paris - Roubaix 1993. Second oldest is Lucien Lesna with his win in Paris - Roubaix in 1902.

teams/overview.label: Teams statistics
teams/overview.description: What team has the most wins? Who has the youngest or oldest riders on their squad? And which team is on average the youngest this season? You can find all team related statistics on this page.

rows.name: Liv AlUla Jayco Women's Continental Team

nations/overview.label: Nations statistics
nations/overview.description: There are 76 from Belgium listed at a WorldTour team in 2026. Italy and France are respectively 2nd and 3rd with 57 and 56 riders.

races/fastest-tts.label: Fastest time trials
races/fastest-tts.description: National Championships Philippines ME - ITT was the fastest time trial in 2026, won by Nash Lim in an average speed of 60.354 km/hour.

major-tours/overview.label: Major tours statistics
major-tours/overview.description: Statistics on the seven major tours in cycling; Volta a Catalunya, Itzulia Basque Country, Paris-Nice, Tour de Suisse, Critérium du Dauphiné, Tour de Romandie and Tirreno-Adriatico.

gear/overview.label: Equipment / gear
gear/overview.description: Alpecin - Premier Tech is riding on Canyon bikes, Shimano for the groupset and Shimano wheels.

climbs/most-visited.label: Most visited climbs
climbs/most-visited.description: The Montjuïc was visited 164 times in all races, 164 more than Col du Tourmalet (73) and Col d
